title: potentilla × adulterina
intro: Potentilla × adulterina, also known as Triseteta potentilla or False Potentilla, is a hybrid plant derived from the Potentilla species. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla × adulterina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
